title: JRZD-465 First Shooting Fifty-Something Wife Documentary Ryoko Osawa
overview: The wife of this time is Ryoko Osawa, 50 years old, who has a beautiful face that you can't think of as a 50-year-old and a full-fledged F-cup body. I met her husband after 27 years of marriage, when she praised the cake made by her husband, who was still employed at a cake shop in town at the time. However, from the time the husband opened his long-awaited store, the two of them started to go crazy with their work. Of course, it is a wife who supports her husband, but she said that she did not understand the lonely woman's heart and came to this appearance. "Can you fill the gap between my mind and body?"
